name: Capturing Their Killer: The Girls on the High Bridge
original_name: Capturing Their Killer: The Girls on the High Bridge
overview: In the bucolic town of Delphi, Indiana, 13-year-old Abigail Williams and 14-year-old Liberty German set out for a walk on a warm February afternoon in 2017 - and never came home. Their bodies were discovered the next day in a wooded area not far from the trail, setting off a five-year-long search that gripped the nation and haunted this close-knit community.
